subject: Pass roles to HttpEntry
commit_message:
Pass roles to HttpEntry

- Pass roles to HttpEntry so that OwnerCheck can verify owning-entity

Issue-ID: AAI-3177
Signed-off-by: Neil Derraugh <neil.derraugh@yoppworks.com>
Change-Id: Ie1536c625be3637fc62658d74690bddcde0a4cba

Patch Set 4:

> Patch Set 2: Code-Review-1
> 
> (1 comment)
> 
> Update the pom.xml <aai.common.version>1.7.0</aai.common.version> to 1.7.1 and also update the aai-parent in the same pom file from 1.7.0 to 1.7.

Think I may have misunderstood this.  I changed line 29 in /pom.xml to both 1.7.1 and 1.7 and neither passed the build.

Patch Set 5:

> Patch Set 4:
> 
> > Patch Set 2: Code-Review-1
> > 
> > (1 comment)
> > 
> > Update the pom.xml <aai.common.version>1.7.0</aai.common.version> to 1.7.1 and also update the aai-parent in the same pom file from 1.7.0 to 1.7.
> 
> Think I may have misunderstood this.  I changed line 29 in /pom.xml to both 1.7.1 and 1.7 and neither passed the build.

Looks like the Releases repository it's trying to pull from doesn't have a 1.7.1 yet. The latest is:
<groupId>org.onap.aai.aai-common</groupId>
<artifactId>aai-parent</artifactId>
<version>1.7.0</version>

The Staging repo otoh has a 1.7.1.  I'm not clear on how the CI pipeline works though. I'll look into it a bit this morning, time permitting.

> <version>1.7.0</version>

> The Staging repo otoh has a 1.7.1.  I'm not clear on how the CI pipeline works though. I'll look into it a bit this morning, time 

Neil, you have done that correctly the first time, we didn't release the artifact as its still 1.7.1-SNAPSHOT. I see new changes in aai-common as thats why we didn't release it yet. I was hoping to release that artifact but when I saw the new change I held that off. You can verify locally by changing 1.7.1 for both parent version and aai.common.version 1.7.1-SNAPSHOT and it should work. 
Since we will need to release an docker image for this, thats why I asked to use the 1.7.1.

I will release 1.7.1 after this gerrit change is merged. 

https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/aai/aai-common/+/112516
